commands.review_summary:
The PR parallelizes parts of doctor repair I/O, adds deep-only filtering for several doctor health contributions, skips bundled plugin load-path insertion, and carries unrelated gateway client pooling plus JSON retry changes.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR defects by source inspection: current main has per-call gateway cancellation/progress handling and ordered OAuth repairs, while the PR removes or reorders those paths. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because this paired PR lacks real behavior proof, mixes unrelated stale runtime changes, and requires a maintainer decision on default doctor semantics before any repair path is safe.

target.title: perf(doctor): parallel I/O + --deep mode (1A+2)
target.body:
## Phase 1A + 2: Parallel I/O + --deep Mode

### Performance optimization for doctor --fix

Issue: #85333

### Overview

Two complementary optimizations to reduce `openclaw doctor --fix` wall-clock time from ~229s towards ~55s:

**Phase 1A — Parallel I/O** (shared foundation)
- `repair-sequencing.ts`: 3 I/O-only repair steps run concurrently via `Promise.all`
- `plugin-dependency-cleanup.ts`: directory walks parallelized — 50+ plugin scans and 6 root-level scans run concurrently

**Plan 2 — `--deep` Mode** (additive on 1A)
- New `mode: "always" | "deepOnly"` field on `DoctorHealthContribution`
- 10 non-critical contributions tagged as `deepOnly`: sandbox, skills, bootstrap-size, shell-completion, browser, hooks-model, systemd-linger, memory-search, device-pairing, workspace-suggestions
- Default `doctor --fix` skips these (faster common case)
- `openclaw doctor --deep` runs all checks (comprehensive audit)
- Estimated savings: **56-124s** from gating

### Why this approach

Most users don't need sandbox detection, shell completion setup, or browser readiness checks on every doctor run. Gating these behind `--deep` preserves their availability while making the default path fast.

### How `--deep` works
```
openclaw doctor --fix         # fast: skips 10 non-critical checks
openclaw doctor --fix --deep  # comprehensive: runs all checks
```

### Verification
- 35/35 tests pass
- Code review: **APPROVED** by deepseek-v4-flash (code-reviewer persona, 5-axis framework)
  - All dimensions 🟢
  - 3 minor nits addressed
- Test coverage for --deep filtering: 3 test cases
